name: Command
note: Cohere's first-generation flagship generative model (API id "command"); deprecated and shut down 2025-09-15, superseded by Command R.

results.notes: Stanford HELM Lite core-scenarios leaderboard, model id 'cohere_command' (confirmed via the model's underlying result-links, distinct from cohere_command-r/-light/-a). MMLU-EM = 0.525. This model previously had zero tracked results.
Stanford HELM Lite, model id 'cohere_command'. MATH (Equivalent, CoT) = 0.236.
Stanford HELM Lite, model id 'cohere_command'. GSM8K-EM = 0.452.
Stanford HELM Lite, model id 'cohere_command'. OpenbookQA-EM = 0.774. Fills a real gap: this model had 0 tracked results in the corpus before this pass.

verificationNotes: Confirmed via docs.cohere.com/changelog/2025-09-15-major-command-deprecations (shutdown 2025-09-15, migrate to Command R 08-2024) and aimodelwatch.dev/models/command (4,096-token context window, legacy pricing $1.00/$2.00 per 1M tokens — matches exactly). No changes.
